title: Art Edition
description: Art Edition is a simple mod that adds blocks, items and entities based on the Bendy IP by Joey Drew Studios
body:
Join the Discord: https://discord.gg/t78p2c3ke3

Visit the Youtube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCwhx-RBTjwQUfndhAU7NuDw

Art Edition is a simple mod that adds blocks, items and entities based on the Bendy IP by Joey Drew Studios

![The Logo of the Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43deb467e388da290d390e26719af577d5777209.png)

# Blocks:
The mod currently adds **over 400 blocks and props** perfect for recreating the decrepit monotone halls of the old studio, including **functional objects** such as **levers, containers, audio devices, and placeable ritual items**


# Items:

![A bunch of items on a wall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd298e710b2b75babcfa914a878868a35603b67f.png)

The mod has **multiple iconic items** from the Bendy IP, including **the Studio Axe and Gent Pipe, Bacon soup, the Chapter 1 Ritual Items, and clothing.**

# Entities:

![All entities in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83012f67cde946616ece018a985ae2adb1c85c67.png)

The mod currently adds in **several iconic entities** from the Bendy IP, such as **the Ink Demon, Searchers, Boris the Wolf, and multiple more.** They currently _do not_ have any interactions between each other.
